fields.name: grade
fields.rule: required grade this key applies to

fields.name: key
fields.rule: required answer key — list of {q, option, marks}

fields.name: attachments
fields.rule: optional hosted attachment/media links, one per line: Name | URL (hosted-URLs-first; rendered as a download footer + inline )

fields.name: target_ids
fields.rule: system selected target school ids (JSON; empty = all prospect/lead)

fields.name: provider_campaign_id
fields.rule: system provider campaign id (Brevo, Mode B)

fields.name: provider_url
fields.rule: system provider edit URL (Brevo, Mode B)

fields.name: recipient_emails
fields.rule: optional recipient email list (one per line; editable, set by the builder; overrides target_ids when present)

fields.name: material_type
fields.rule: question_paper, omr_sheet, attendance_sheet, instructions, courier_label, declaration.

fields.name: negative_marking_enabled
fields.rule: optional — apply negative marking when scoring

fields.name: negative_marks
fields.rule: optional marks deducted per wrong answer

fields.name: re_eval_window_days
fields.rule: optional days after result publish to allow re-evaluation

fields.name: review_status
fields.rule: uploaded, validated, exceptions_found, reviewed, approved, rejected.

fields.name: payment_status
fields.rule: pending, link_created, paid, manually_confirmed, failed, reversed, reconciled.

fields.name: status
fields.rule: draft, submitted, approved, students_open, count_finalised, payment_pending, paid, slot_confirmed, materials_released, exam_completed, results_published, certificates_released, cancelled.

fields.name: status
fields.rule: draft, link_created, pending, paid, manually_confirmed, failed, expired, reversed, reconciled.

fields.name: revised_score
fields.rule: optional revised raw score (set on resolve)

fields.name: award_category
fields.rule: participation, bronze, silver, gold, topper, merit.

fields.name: status
fields.rule: draft, imported, under_review, approved, published, corrected, withheld.

fields.name: responses
fields.rule: system optional — student's per-question answers [{q, option}] for scoring

fields.name: source
fields.rule: required source name e.g. kvs or cbse

fields.name: file
fields.rule: system computed — required uploaded file reference

fields.name: mapping
fields.rule: system computed — source-column to canonical-field mapping (JSON)

fields.name: board
fields.rule: optional board: CBSE, ICSE, State, Cambridge, Other.

fields.name: import_id
fields.rule: system source import batch (set for imported prospects)

fields.name: referral
fields.rule: system optional campaign/source reference that drove registration (attribution, set from the link)

fields.name: school_roll_number
fields.rule: optional; unique within school+participation if provided.

fields.name: status
fields.rule: draft, valid, invalid, finalised, absent, disqualified, evaluated, certified.

fields.name: role
fields.rule: required; one of the frozen role list
